PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?airDate WHERE {
  wd:Q438357 wdt:P179 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P577 ?airDate .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?airDate) , "2024-03"))
}
